params.name: Christophor Piano
params.description:
On May 29, 1709 AD, Christophor made the first piano.
Before the invention of the piano, the harpsichord was a popular musical instrument that used quills to pluck the strings. Christophor revolutionized this instrument by replacing the quills with hammers, making it a struck-string instrument. This improved the expressiveness, tonal range, and control of the sound, playing a crucial role in the evolution of musical instruments.
